revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-5-080

Chain taken from two or more mooring eyes of a buoy and brought together at a central link (e.g. a catface) connecting them to the main mooring chain through a swivel.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Bridle (chain)}}
